name: Mann Chalay Ka Sauda
overview: Mann Chalay Ka Sauda is a drama serial written by Ashfaq Ahmed and was first aired by PTV (Pakistan Television) Network in early 90s. It’s a story of a spiritual journey of Irshad, a multi-millionaire divorcee, encountering the emptiness of material success, embarks on a spiritual journey seeking truth and meaning about his inner self and his spiritual being. As he shifts from worldly pursuits to a spiritual quest, he faces challenges: temptations of his former life, internal struggles, and the pull between material and spiritual value.
